scenes.title: The old vault model is broken.
scenes.caption: No skin. No verified track record. No guaranteed liquidity path.

scenes.title: Traders prove first.
scenes.caption: Paper mode, junior first-loss capital, and public performance before investor deposits.

scenes.title: Investors browse proof, not promises.
scenes.caption: Vault health, buffer, status, and strategy are visible before capital moves.

scenes.title: Risk is visible at the point of action.
scenes.caption: Deposit and withdrawal decisions sit next to health, NAV, and activity.

scenes.title: Managers operate inside guardrails.
scenes.caption: Graduation progress, junior capital, and limits stay in the trader workflow.

scenes.title: USDC liquidity. WSOL exposure. Pyth NAV.
scenes.caption: Reserve checks and unwind paths protect withdrawal confidence.
